problems.question: For the given data structures
problems.answer:
Given a stack, what will be the final elements in the stack after the following operations
push(a), push(b), push(c), pop, pop, push(d)
Given a queue, what will be the final elements in the queue after the following operations
enqueue(a), enqueue(b), enqueue(c), dequeue, dequeue
